title: Configure Jira MCP Integration in Cursor for Both Developers
description:
Configure the Atlassian MCP integration in Cursor IDE for both developers (Ryan and Waqar) so that Cursor AI can read Jira tickets directly.

### Setup Steps
1. Generate Atlassian API token
2. Configure `.cursor/mcp.json` with Jira URL, username, API token, and project filter (MBT)
3. Server identifier is `user-atlassian` when calling from AI

### Configuration
- JIRA_URL: https://goodmangroup.atlassian.net
- JIRA_PROJECTS_FILTER: MBT
- Command: `uvx mcp-atlassian`
acceptance_criteria: Ryan has Jira MCP working in Cursor
Waqar has Jira MCP working in Cursor
implementation_notes: Waqar connected using his own API token after the 1Password shared link expired. Part of Phase 2 in docs/JIRA_TICKET_BACKLOG.md.
comment_summary: Developer initially couldn't access the shared 1Password link (expired), then connected Jira to Cursor using his own API token.
